description: Guidance on reporting cyber fraud incidents in India, including immediate steps after becoming a victim, preserving evidence, filing complaints through official portals, contacting banks, and reporting to law enforcement agencies.
common_questions: How do I report cyber fraud?
Where can I file a cyber crime complaint?
What should I do if I lost money online?
How do I contact the cyber crime helpline?
Can I report cyber fraud online?
How do I file an FIR for cyber crime?
guidelines: Immediately stop communicating with the fraudster.
Call the National Cyber Crime Helpline (1930) immediately if money has been transferred.
Report the incident on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal.
Inform your bank or payment service provider immediately.
Preserve all evidence including screenshots, chat history, transaction receipts, SMS messages, emails and call recordings.
File an FIR if instructed by the police or if significant financial loss has occurred.
dont: Do not continue talking to the scammer.
